execute() {var vaRuntimeUtil = new global.VaTopicRuntimeUtil();vaVars.optionsCount_21bd6acae5ad48339e365650df0a7d44 = 0; var funcObj = {\"buildOptions\": function() {return [{\"value\":\"yes\",\"label\":gs.getMessageLang(\"Yes\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())},{\"value\":\"no\",\"label\":gs.getMessageLang(\"No\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())}];}};function isValid(option) {return !gs.nil(option) && !global.JSUtil.nil(option.value) && !global.JSUtil.nil(option.label);}function fixInvalid(invalidOption) {var fixedOption = {'value': 'no_data', 'label': 'no_data'};if (!gs.nil(invalidOption)) {fixedOption.value = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.value) ? invalidOption.value : fixedOption.value;fixedOption.label = !global.JSUtil.nil(invalidOption.label) ? invalidOption.label : fixedOption.label;}return fixedOption;}function normalizeKeys(obj){Object.keys(obj).forEach(function (key) {var k = key.toLowerCase();if (k !== key) {obj[k] = obj[key];delete obj[key];}});return (obj);}var choiceOptions = [];choiceOptions = vaRuntimeUtil.executeFunction(funcObj, 'buildOptions');var noOptions = gs.nil(choiceOptions) || choiceOptions.length==0;if (noOptions) {choiceOptions = [];}else {var invalidCount = 0;var normalizedChoiceOptions = [];for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {normalizedChoiceOptions.push(normalizeKeys(choiceOptions[i]));}choiceOptions = normalizedChoiceOptions;for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {if (global.JSUtil.nil(choiceOptions[i].label)) {choiceOptions[i].label = choiceOptions[i].value;}}for (var i = 0; i < choiceOptions.length; i++) {if (!isValid(choiceOptions[i])) {invalidCount++;choiceOptions[i] = fixInvalid(choiceOptions[i]);}}noOptions = invalidCount === choiceOptions.length;if (noOptions) {choiceOptions = [];}vaVars.optionsCount_21bd6acae5ad48339e365650df0a7d44 = choiceOptions.length;return ackMsg=null;ackMsg=(function execute() {\n return (function execute() {\n\n var gr = new GlideRecord('x_2048400_churn_1_customer_profile_table');\n\n gr.addQuery(\n 'company_name',\n vaVars.customer_company_name\n );\n\n gr.query();\n\n if (gr.next()) {\n\n vaVars.customer_found = \"true\";\n\n vaVars.company =\n gr.company_name.toString();\n\n vaVars.risk_score =\n gr.churn_risk_score.toString();\n\n vaVars.risk_category =\n gr.risk_category.toString();\n\n vaVars.open_tickets =\n gr.open_tickets.toString();\n\n vaVars.nps =\n gr.nps_score.toString();\n\n vaVars.ai_explanation =\n gr.ai_risk_explanation.toString();\n\n return \"Customer found\";\n\n }\n\n else {\n\n vaVars.customer_found = \"false\";\n\n return \"Customer not found\";\n }\n\n})();\n})();(function() ackMsg=null;ackMsg=(function execute() {\n return (function execute() {\n\n var customer = new GlideRecord('u_churn_customer');\n\n customer.addQuery(\n 'u_company_name',\n vaVars.customer_company_name\n );\n\n customer.query();\n\n if(customer.next()) {\n\n var task =\n new GlideRecord('u_churn_intervention');\n\n task.initialize();\n\n task.u_customer =\n customer.sys_id;\n\n task.u_intervention_type =\n 'Call';\n\n task.u_outcome =\n 'Pending';\n\n task.u_notes =\n 'Created automatically from Virtual Agent';\n\n task.insert();\n\n vaVars.task_message =\n 'Retention intervention task created successfully.';\n }\n\n else {\n\n vaVars.task_message =\n 'Customer not found. Task not created.';\n }\n\n return vaVars.task_message;\n\n})();\n})();(function() sys_cs_topic.description: AI chatbot to check customer churn risk scores and recommendations
sys_cs_topic.key_phrases: customer_churn_risk_query customer risk churn retention hight risk customer health risk score
sys_cs_topic.name: customer_churn_risk_query
sys_cs_topic.title: customer_churn_risk_query
